title: Preview & save fixes
description: Fixes the live preview not restoring the settings theme after saving, and renames the Preview button to Try Live.

Fixed: After saving a new or edited theme with Try Live active, the app now correctly reverts to whichever theme was selected in settings instead of staying on the draft theme
If the theme being edited is the current settings theme, saving now reloads the freshly-saved version of that theme
Changed: Renamed the Preview button to Try Live for clarity — it applies the draft theme live to the running app, not just the mockup

title: Initial release
description: First public release of Theme Creator.

Added: Full color picker for every CSS variable token across all groups (base, accent, status, syntax, ANSI, HTTP, VCS, editor, UI)
Live preview — apply your in-progress theme to the running Voiden app instantly
Restore button to revert to the saved theme while previewing
Export any theme as a portable .json file
Auto-derives --accent-rgb and --accent-alt-rgb when an accent color is picked
Dark and Light base templates with sensible defaults
Themes persisted as JSON files in userData/themes/
Status bar entry point (Themes button, right side) — opens or focuses the editor tab
